creator: mita@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
A new port jp-vfghostscript-5.01 is submitted as:
ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/jp-vfghostscript-5.01-970823.tar.gz

This is a port for latest Aladdin ghostscript version 5.01, 
with Japanese font and printer driver support.  
Since Japanese support for gs-5.03 has not been done yet, 
gs5.01 will be used for a file in Japan.
